hero.title: Discover a New Way of Living
hero.subtitle: Make the Countryside Your Home

housing.title: Find Your Home
housing.desc: Browse traditional stone houses, modern apartments, and community-supported housing options

jobs.title: Local Employment
jobs.desc: Discover opportunities in agriculture, tourism, and traditional crafts

support.title: Support
support.desc: Access resources and guides to make your transition to rural life seamless and stress-free

cta.title: Ready for Your New Beginning?
cta.subtitle: Join us today and take the first step towards discovering a new way of living.

hero.desc1: Poblaria is a platform created to help people discover new life opportunities in rural areas, connecting them with housing, jobs, services and real local communities.
hero.desc2: Our mission is to support village revitalization by making relocation easier, more human and more accessible.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: We want to make rural living visible, attractive and realistic by giving people the information and tools they need to take the first step.

revitalize.title: Revitalize Villages
revitalize.desc: We help rural areas become more visible by showing their housing, jobs and lifestyle opportunities.

connect.title: Connect People
connect.desc: Poblaria connects people who want a new life with communities ready to welcome new residents.

future.title: Build a Better Future
future.desc: We believe rural life can offer balance, sustainability and stronger human connection.

cta.title: Ready to discover your next place?
cta.desc: Explore villages, housing opportunities, jobs and local resources designed to help you imagine a new life in a rural community.

hero.label: Contact us
hero.title: Let’s build a better rural future together.
hero.desc: Have a question, an idea, or want to collaborate with Poblaria? We would love to hear from you.

info.title: Get in touch
info.desc: Whether you are a village, an organization, or someone interested in moving to a rural area, Poblaria is here to connect people, opportunities, and local communities.

cta.title: Ready to start the conversation?
cta.desc: Together, we can help rural communities grow again and create meaningful opportunities for people looking for a new way of living.
